bug.description: DATA PUMP TURN OFF CONSTRAINT VALIDATION DURING IMPDP
REMAP_DATA FOR AN OBJECT ATTRIBUTE FAILS
MISSING DATAPUMP SUPPORT FOR SUBPARTITION STORAGE ATTRIBUTES
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT INMEMORY MEMCOMPRESS OF HIDDEN COLUMN
ADD SXML SUPPORT FOR SEGMENT CREATION IN SUBPARTITION TEMPLATES
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL GENERATES INCORRECT DDL FOR TABLE WITH USING INDEX CLAUSE
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL INCORRECT DDL - UNUSED COLM WITH SCOPE REF CONSTRAINT
TRANSFORM=DISABLE_ARCHIVE_LOGGING Y NOT HONORED LOB SEGMENTS
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT BITMAP INDEX ON TYPEID OF TYPE COLM
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT INMEMORY COLM CLAUSE IN OBJECT TABLE
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT READ ONLY CLAUSE IN OBJECT TABLE
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT COMPONENT ACTIONS CLAUSE IN AUDIT POLICY
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT KEEP,SCALE,EXTEND FLAG IN ID COLM
DBMS_METADATA_DIFF.COMPARE_ALTER GENERATES INCORRECT DDL FOR HASH PARTITIONS
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT MV WITH ATTRIBUTE CLUSTERING
SEQ, INDEX DBMS_METADATA_DIFF.COMPARE_ALTER DOES NOT WORK FOR CERTAIN CLAUSE
ORA-31684 ON IMPORT OF SCHEMA WITH JOIN ATTRIBUTE CLUSTER
DATA PUMP EXPORT PERFORMANCE IS MUCH SLOWER IN 12.2
MISSING ALTER ANY SEQUENCE GRANT IN THE DATAPUMP_IMP_FULL_DATABASE ROLE
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT OBJECT TYPE COLUMN IN MV LOG
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT PARTITIONED MV ON NESTED TABLE
DP IMPORT LOADS INTO PRE-EXISTING TABLE WITH PARTITION_OPTIONS=MERGE
DBMS_METADATA_DIFF DOES NOT WORK FOR TABLE WITH LOGICAL REPLICATION
DDL OBTAINED FOR AN EXISTING TABLE USING DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML() IS NOT CORRECT
CARTESIAN PRODUCT IN INDEX COMPOSITE PARTITION DURING EXPORT.
ORA-12990, ORA-39083 ON IMPORT OF TABLE VIA IMPDP UTILITY
ORA-31003 ERROR WHEN IMPORTING FULL DATABASE IN PARALLEL
SCHEMA LEVEL EXPORT/IMPORT CHANGES VIRTUAL COLUMN DEFINATION
TTS IMPDP GENERATES ORA-1647 ERROR WITH UNUSABLE PARTITIONED LOCAL INDEX
ORA-00922, ORA-39083 ON IMPORT VIA IMPDP (USING PARAMETERS SPECIFIED FOR ADWCS)
MOVE CHUNK FAILS WITH ORA-00955 WHEN UNIQUE INDEX AND CONSTRAINT IS CREATED
TEST_SXML FAILS MISMATCH FOR A PARTITIONED TABLE WITH ENCRYPTED LOB COLUMN.
12.2 WRONG DDL GENERATED FROM DATAPUMP FOR EXTERNAL TABLES -ORA-39083 ORA-00931
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL CAPTURE INCORRECT STORAGE OPTIONS OF THE XML COLUMN ON GTT
SLOW PARSE ON SQL FOR TRANSPORTABLE TABLESPACES
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL GENERATES INCORRECT DDL FOR PARTN TBL WITH VARRAY COLM
UNPRIVILEGED EXPORT WITH EXCLUDE FILTER CAUSES DATAPUMP CRASH
DATAPUMP IMPORT IS FAILING WITH ORA-12911 FOR 19.1 UPGRADED DB (12.1.0.2.0 DB UPGRADED TO 19.1 DB)
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL GENERATES MV WITH SEGMENT CREATION IMMEDIATE CLAUSE
DBMS_METADATA.GET_SXML_DDL SHOULD SUPPORT COMPRESS CLAUSE IN NESTED TABLE OF PARTITIONED MV
DATAPUMP EXPORT INVOKED BY A PRIVILEGE USER EXECUTES A QUERY FOR V$OPEN_CURSOR
DBMS_METADATA_DIFF DOES NOT WORK FOR NESTED TABLE WITH LOGICAL REPLICATION
IMPDP ERRORS OUT ORA-014451 WHILE CREATING GLOBAL TEMPORARY TABLE
12.2 DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL IS SLOW DUE TO SLOW ACCESS ON DICTIONARY VIEWS
DBMS_METADATA_DIFF DOES NOT WORK FOR HYBRID PARTITIONED TABLE
ORA-31684 IMPORTING PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION
INCORRECT PARTITIONING CLAUSE DURING SXML RETRIEVAL
ATP-D DATA PUMP IMPORT FROM ATP-D INSTANCE TO A LOCAL DB INSTANCE FAILS
ORA-1426 DBMS_METADATA REFERENCE PARTITIONS HIGHER NUMBER
IMPDP TRANSFORM=INDEX_COMPRESSION_CLAUSE \COMPRESS ADVANCED HIGH\ SHOULD NOT APPLY FOR LOCAL BITMAP INDEX
CANT IMPORT INTO AN EXISTING TABLE WITH EXTRA COLUMNS WHEN ENCRYPTION USED
EDITIONING VIEW CANNOT BE EXPORTED AS VIEWS_AS_TABLES
IMPDP ORA-14189 THIS PHYSICAL ATTRIBUTE MAY NOT BE SPECIFIED FOR AN INDEX SUBPARTITION
IMPDP DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR FOR IDENTITY COLUMN WHEN IMPORT ALL VERSUS METADATA_ONLY
SXML PRIMARY KEY CONSTRAINTS ARE NOT PROPERLY DROPPED FOR INDEX ORGANIZED TABLE
18.4 ADWC - ORA-39242 UNABLE TO EXPORT/IMPORT LONG RAW DATA TYPE
IMXT HIT ORA-64350 WHILE IMPORTING IM HYPT WITH PARTITION_OPTIONS=MERGE
ORA-31684 ORA-39112 WITH FIX 28539085 AND VERSION=11.2
ORA-39151 DATAPUMP IMPDP DOES NOT CREATE DEPENDENT OBJECTS FOR TABLES WITH ILM
IMPDP WITH TRANSFORM=DISABLE_ARCHIVE_LOGGING Y GENERATES ARCHIVES
DBMS_METADATA_DIFF.COMPARE_ALTER DOES NOT WORK FOR INMEMORY ENABLED AT COLUMN LEVEL
DOOSAN DATAPUMP IMPORT FAILING WITH ORA-04021 TIMEOUT OCCURRED WHILE WAITING
EXPDP RUNNING LONG TIME QUERYING KU$_SUBPARTITION_EST_VIEW WHEN PROCESSING TABLE_DATA
IMPDP PARTITION_OPTIONS=DEPARTITION DOES NOT RETAIN LOB TABLESPACE STORAGE PROPERTY
DATA PUMP IMPORT REMAP_SCHEMA FOR SYSTEM RETURNS ERROR
ORA-22998 RUNING DBMS_DATAPUMP.DATA_FILTER WITH VALUE AS CLOB
POSSIBLE DEADLOCK/TIMEOUT ERRORS DURING PARALLEL IMPORT WITH TABLE_EXISTS_ACTION=REPLACE
ORA-21560 DBMS_METADATA.FETCH_DDL IN 19C NOT IN 12.2
TTS FAILS WITH ORA-01422 ON V$ENCRYPTION_WALLET
Fix for Bug 30252140
DBMS_METADATA NOT DISPLAYING THE SEMICOLON AND SLASH FOR TYPE SPECIFICATIONS
DATAPUMP IMPORT SUPPORT FOR SPATIAL AND OAA TABLES ON SE2
REMAP TABLESPACE IS NOT CONSIDERED FOR LOCAL TEMPORARY TABLESPACE DURING IMPDP
DBMS_METADATA IS MASHING TOGETHER THE AUTH ID WHEN SPECIFIED FOR OBJECT TYPE
IMPDP WORKER TERMINATED WITH ORA-39029 AFTER MULTIPLE ORA-01775
ORA-06502, LPX-00409, ORA-31606 ARE REPORTED WHEN NLS=POLISH_POLAND.AL32UTF8
IMPDP 11.2 TO 18C OR HIGHER HITS ORA-904 WHEN TABLES HAVE EXTENDED STATISTICS
IMPDP VERY SLOW DUE TO PROCESS REORDERING
18C DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL FAILED WITH ORA-16000 IN READ ONLY MODE
GET ORA-39126 WORKER UNEXPECTED FATAL ERROR IN KUPWWORKER.FETCH_XML_OBJECTS
DATA PUMP EXPORT | HITTING ORA-31637 WHILE RUNNING DATA PUMP-DPLOAD CONCURRENCY TEST IN SAME PDB
SELECT FROM MASTER TABLE RUNS SLOW DURING TABLE_DATA EXPORT WHEN THERE ARE MANY SUBPARTITIONS
ORA-20000 DURING IMPDP WITH STATS AND THE UNIQUE INDEX FOR THE PK IS NOT CREATED
DPUMP IMPORT FAILS WITH ORA-39083 TABLE AUDSYS.AMGT$DP$AUD$UNIFIED
SIMULTANEOUS DATA PUMP JOB CREATION FAILS DUE TO ATOMICITY WINDOW
PARALLEL DATAPUMP SLOW ON CONSTRAINTS
18.X UPGRADE FAILED WITH ORA-22973 SIZE OF OBJECT IDENTIFIER EXCEEDS MAXIMUM
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL GENERATES NO KEYWORDS FOR NOT COMPRESSED INDEXES
AWRHUB NOTICING ORA-01403 NO DATA FOUND INCORRECTLY
TTS EXPDP QUERIES V$ENCRYPTED_TABLESPACES FOR EVERY TBS SLOWING DOWN PERFORMANCE
ADB-D IMPORT PERFORMANCE OF PACKAGE_BODY
SPIN-OFF OF BUG# 31317961 FOR PARTIAL BACKOUT OF BUG# 27403988 FROM MAIN LABEL
DATA PMP; DATA PUMP PERFORMANCE IS HURT BY LACK OF STATS ON MASTER TABLES
DBMS_METADATA_UTIL THROWS AN INVALID CURSOR EXCEPTION.
ADBD COMPLETE FIX FOR 29543605 WHICH INCLUDES ALL THE MISSING FILES
APPSST19C XTTS PDB - TABLE IMPORT/CREATION FAILED WITH ORA-39083 ORA-14334
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL RETURNS NOKEEP ,GLOBAL FOR 11.2.0.4 IN 19C FOR SEQUENCE
PROXY ONLY CONNECT PROPERTY FOR SCHEMA ISNT PRESERVED IN FULL EXPDP/IMPDP
IMPORT FAIL IN INDEX CREATION WITH TRANSFORM CLAUSE INDEX COMPRESS TO LOW
EXPDP OF STATIC TABLES FAILS WITH ORA-39126 WORKER UNEXPECTED FATAL ERROR IN KUPW$WORKER.UNLOAD_DATA - WHILE/POST NON-DESTRUCTIVE WORKLOAD RUN
IMPDB NOT RUNNING IN PARALLEL
FIXED VIEW QUERIES FROM ROOT RETURNING MULTIPLE ROWS
DATA PUMP EXPORT IGNORES ESTIMATE=BLOCKS
ADB-S ORA39126 AND ORA01031 WHILE IMPORT USING FA FULL DUMP INTO ADB-S
TOTAL ESTIMATION USING BLOCKS METHOD IS MISSING STARTING WITH 12.2
DBMS_METADATA.GET_DDL HANGS FOR WRAPPED PL/SQL PROCEDURES.
ZDM IMPORT ADW-S DB LINK MIGRATION THROWS INTERNAL ERROR
DBMS_METADATA MODIFYSXML REMAP_SCHEMA NOT WORKING FOR INDEX
SPATIAL EXPORT CALLS ANONYMOUS PL/SQL CODE THAT WERE BEING EXECUTED THOUSANDS OF TIMES
IMPDP + KN ORA-31600 INVALID INPUT VALUE WILDCARD_PERM_TABLESPACE FOR PARAMETER NAME IN FUNCTION SET_TRANSFORM_PARAM
DATAPUMP IMP FAILURE- ORA-39844 BAD STREAM FORMAT DETECTED [KLAPRS_15] [31] [60] [4] [1]
DATAPUMP EXPORT JOB TAKES TOO LONG TO COMPLETE
IMPORT TRANSFORM PARAMETER, DWCS_CVT_IOTS IS NOT CONVERTING TABLES CORRECTLY.
ORA-60 FOR MASTER TABLE WHEN INHERITED COMPRESSION TABLESPACE SETTING
IMPDP TO 19C USING EXPORT DUMP OF 11.2.0.4 HANGS WITH ENQ TM - CONTENTION
DML GENERATION OPTIMIZATION FOR PARTITIONS IN DATA PUMP DOESNT CONSIDER DIFFERENCE IN DEGREE OF PARALLELISM
WITH PERPDB SUPLOG SUPPORT CERTAIN CODE PATH SHOULD CHECK MINIMAL SUPLOG
Fix for Bug 32190322
PDB IS IN MIGRATE STATUS AFTER DBCLI UPGRADE FROM 12.1.0.2 TO 19.8.0.0.0
DP ORA-01008 IS RAISED AFTER A SNAPSHOT TOO OLD EXCEPTION IS RAISED BY WORKER
EXPDP IN 19.7 THREE TIMES SLOWER THAN IT WAS IN 11.2.0.4
DATAPUMP EXPORT OF LARGE DATABASE TAKING TOO LONG TO COMPLETE AS COMPARED TO EXPDP

TABLE STATISTICS WILL NOT BE IMPORTED WITH TABLE MODE

ADDITIONAL VALUES EXPDP/IMPDP DATAPUMP PARAMETER TRACE

EXPDP ORA-39076 CANNOT DELETE JOB SYS_EXPORT_SCHEMA_03 FOR USER HTFD

WRONG BEHAVIOR WITH COLLATION_CLAUSE = NON_DEFAULT

REWRITE DATA PUMP PATCH LOCKING TEST TKDPATCHRAC.TSC

Fix for Bug 33517865
OCI FADEV IMPORT ERROR - PLS-00201 IDENTIFIER SYS.DBMS_AQADM MUST BE DECLARED

TRACKING BUG FOR COMBO OF 32759991 32878145 32919937 32984678 (REPLACEMENT FOR MINI MLR 33407604)

THREE DOMAIN INDEX CREATION FAILED DURING THE IMPORT PROCESS
INCORRECT MAPPING OF ERROR ORA-39244 AND ITS CORRESPONDING MESSAGE
ORA-30665 WHEN USING TRANSFORM=CONSTRAINT_NOVALIDATE AND TABLE HAS DEFAULT ON NULL
DATAPUMP REMOVE RESTRICTION TO DO IMPORT FROM HIGHER TSTZ VERSION TO LOWER VERSION

INCORRECT DDL WHEN GENERATED VIA THE SXMLDDL TRANSFORM
